title.zh: 轮足机器人 MPC 运动控制稳定性分析与仿真

subtitle.en: Reduced-order modeling, constrained regulation, and offset-free tracking on TRON1 using an MPC controller.
subtitle.zh: TRON1 轮腿机器人的低阶建模、MPC 姿态控制与跟踪

intro.en: An MPC course project on the TRON1 wheel-legged robot. The work covers reduced-order modeling, constrained regulation MPC with terminal ingredients, and an offset-free tracking extension validated in MuJoCo.
intro.zh: 模型预测控制课程项，围绕 TRON1 轮腿机器人实现了降阶建模、带终端项与终端集的约束 MPC，以及基于扰动估计的无静差跟踪扩展，并在 MuJoCo 中完成验证。
